en_EN: Visit friends. True winners know how to turn small efforts into huge "golden" rewards.
zh_CN: 拜访好友，真正的赢家都知道四两拨千“金”的技巧！

en_EN: Rob the rich to aid the poor. Use your excellent scratch card skills to unlock the treasure vault!
zh_CN: 劫富济贫，利用高超的刮刮乐技巧打开宝库！

en_EN: You obtained a Shield, which can block one incoming attack.
zh_CN: 你获得一个护盾，可以阻挡一次攻击。

en_EN: Everyone bought blind boxes while shopping. Yours turned out to be a rare limited edition.
zh_CN: 逛街时大家都买了盲盒，你的竟然是限量款。

en_EN: You bet a friend on who has more daily steps. Right before bed, you tie your phone to your dog and successfully top the WeChat Step leaderboard.
zh_CN: 和朋友打赌比拼步数，你在睡觉前把手机绑在狗身上，成功占领微信运动封面。

en_EN: You browse a secondhand platform and buy your dream game console for an extremely low price.
zh_CN: 逛二手平台，以极低的价格买到了心仪游戏机。

en_EN: You do a single gacha pull, golden light flashes across the screen, and you get the limited-time SSR. Your friend is green with envy.
zh_CN: 随手单抽，屏幕闪过金光，出了当期限定SSR，朋友嫉妒得面目全非。

en_EN: You pick up a random book at a used bookstore, only to find it's an out-of-print copy signed by the author.
zh_CN: 逛旧书店随手拿起一本书，竟然是作者亲笔签名的绝版珍藏。

en_EN: You clean out old items during a house cleanup and find a rare, extremely valuable ancient coin.
zh_CN: 大扫除时整理旧物，发现一枚稀有古币，价值连城。

en_EN: You bet a friend on claw machine wins. You insert two coins, and grab the hardest-to-get limited oversized plush on your first try.
zh_CN: 和朋友打赌抓娃娃，随手投了两枚游戏币，一把就抓出了店里最难出的限定款超大公仔。

en_EN: You give a random gift to an in-game NPC, accidentally unlock a hidden storyline, and get the only server-exclusive equipment.
zh_CN: 随手给游戏里的 NPC 送了个礼物，意外解锁了隐藏剧情，拿到了全服唯一的装备。

en_EN: You're missing vintage props for your new video, so you try your luck at the scrap yard. For just 5 yuan, you get a fully functional 1990s film camera in perfect working order.
zh_CN: 你拍选题缺老物件素材，去废品站碰运气，只花五块钱就淘到了一台功能完好的90年代胶片机。

en_EN: You're shooting a vlog in the community garden, when a ginger cat walks right up to the camera and photobombs your shot. All the bullet comments say how adorable it is.
zh_CN: 你在小区花园拍vlog，一只橘猫主动凑到镜头前，成功抢镜，弹幕都说它可爱。

en_EN: You go for a morning jog along the river, and find a stone eroded by the current into a perfect heart shape. You take it home and use it as a decoration for your flower pot.
zh_CN: 清晨在河边慢跑，意外捡到一块被流水冲刷成心形的石子，放进花盆做装饰。

en_EN: You go to take photos at the old tea garden in town during late autumn. The tea farmer insists on giving you a pack of exclusive surplus sun-dried pre-Qingming tea (the highest grade of spring tea).
zh_CN: 深秋去镇上的老茶园拍照，茶农非要送你一包被阳光晒透的明前茶独家余货。

en_EN: Most of the mint you planted on the balcony has wilted. When you change the soil, you find strawberry seeds you dropped earlier have sprouted three tiny leaves. In summer, they bear milky white small strawberries that are three times sweeter than the ones sold in supermarkets.
zh_CN: 阳台种的薄荷枯了大半，换土时翻出之前掉进去的草莓籽，已经冒了三片小嫩叶，夏天结了奶白的小草莓，甜度比超市买的高三倍。

en_EN: When closing the windows during a typhoon, you find a small parakeet knocked unconscious by the wind. You nurse it back to health in a week, but it refuses to leave. It becomes your account's exclusive mascot, perching on your notebook to appear in every one of your videos.
zh_CN: 台风天关窗时捡到一只被吹晕的小鹦鹉，养了一周伤好不肯走，成了账号的专属吉祥物，每条视频都要站在你笔记本上出镜。

en_EN: You rummage through the top of your old wardrobe and find floral fabric left by your grandmother. You were going to use it as a rag, but you cut it into a pillow cover that fits your balcony rattan chair perfectly. All your fans beg for the purchase link after seeing it in your videos.
zh_CN: 旧衣柜顶层翻出外婆当年留的碎花布，本来想当抹布，裁成抱枕套刚好适配你阳台的藤椅，粉丝看了都求链接。

en_EN: The repairman fixing your balcony leak also welds your wobbly flower shelf steady for free. He says he saw your small town breakfast guide on your account, took his kid to eat there last week, and his child loved it.
zh_CN: 修阳台漏水的工人顺手帮你把松动的花架焊稳了，不收钱，说看你账号发的小城早餐攻略，他上周跟着去吃了他家孩子特别喜欢。

en_EN: You take a detour through the old alley after work, and find a 30-year-old tailor shop closing down. The owner gives you a whole box of remaining vintage pearl buttons for free. You use them to make handmade hair clip merch that sells out in seconds.
zh_CN: 下班绕路走老巷，撞见一家开了三十年的裁缝店要关门，老板把剩下的一整盒vintage珍珠纽扣全送你，你用来做手工发夹周边秒空。

en_EN: You go to the market to buy tomatoes. The vendor sees you shooting content, and gives you a basket of freshly picked daisies for free to use as props. You put them in a glass jar when you get home, which perfectly matches your new "Early Summer Dining Table" theme.
zh_CN: 去菜市场买番茄，卖菜阿叔看你拍素材，免费塞了一筐刚摘的小雏菊，说给你当拍摄道具，回家插在玻璃罐里刚好配你新更的「初夏餐桌」主题。

en_EN: You climb the back hill after rain to shoot mushrooms, and find a rare variety of wild tea tree. You pick half a kilo of fresh leaves and roast them, the aroma is even richer than the pre-Qingming tea you buy at the store.
zh_CN: 雨后爬后山拍菌子，发现一颗品种稀有的野茶树，摘了半斤鲜叶炒了，香味比买的明前茶还浓。

en_EN: You take a casual photo of the sunset from your balcony and post it on WeChat Moments. The local culture and tourism bureau notices it, hires you to shoot the town's tourism promotional video, and pays you enough to cover a full year of rent.
zh_CN: 随手拍了阳台的晚霞发朋友圈，被本地文旅局看中，找你拍小城文旅宣传片，给的报酬够你付一年房租。

en_EN: The small town handmade merch you made catches the eye of a chain cultural and creative store. You sign a consignment contract, and your monthly passive income is even higher than what you earn from sponsored ads.
zh_CN: 你做的小城手作周边被一个连锁文创店看中，签了代销合同，每个月被动收入比你接广告还多。

en_EN: You attend a local creator exchange event, and win first prize: the latest mirrorless camera. Your old camera broke exactly a week ago, so it's perfect timing.
zh_CN: 参加本地自媒体交流会，抽中了一等奖，是最新款的微单相机，刚好你之前的旧相机坏了一周。

en_EN: You go to the suburbs to dig wild vegetables in spring, and find a large patch of wild houttuynia cordata (a popular Chinese edible herb) next to a field of wild tulips. The video you shoot makes the local trending list, and lots of people come to visit the spot.
zh_CN: 春天去郊外挖野菜，挖到一大丛野生折耳根，旁边长了一片野郁金香，拍的视频上了本地热搜，好多人过来打卡。

en_EN: You attend a friend's wedding and catch the bridal bouquet. On the way home, a florist offers to preserve it as dried flowers for free. You hang it on your balcony wall, and it becomes your favorite decoration.
zh_CN: 去参加朋友的婚礼，抢到了捧花，回家路上碰到一个花店老板，免费给你把捧花做成了干花，挂在你阳台的墙上，成了最好的装饰。

en_EN: You go fishing by the river, don't catch any fish, but reel up an old brass bell. After you polish it, it has a really beautiful, clear ring.
zh_CN: 去江边钓鱼，没钓到鱼，钓上来一个旧的铜铃铛，擦干净之后声音特别好听。

en_EN: You go to the mountains to shoot the starry sky, and happen to catch a meteor shower. You make a wish that your account hits 1 million followers. When you wake up the next day, your follower count has exactly reached 1 million.
zh_CN: 你去山里拍星空，刚好碰到流星雨，许的愿望是账号粉丝破百万，结果第二天醒来一看，粉丝刚好破了一百万。

en_EN: A handmade gift you sent to a fan was given by the fan to her hospitalized grandmother. The grandmother felt much better after watching your videos, and after she recovered, she sent you a whole basket of tangerines grown in her own yard.
zh_CN: 你之前给粉丝寄的手作礼物，被一个粉丝送给了她住院的奶奶，奶奶看完你的视频心情好很多，病好之后专门给你寄了一筐自己家种的橘子。

en_EN: You join a local handmade market, and all the hair clips you made are sold out. You also catch the eye of a local intangible cultural heritage inheritor, who takes you as an apprentice to teach you traditional silk wrap flower craft. Your tutorial video for the craft sells over 100,000 copies.
zh_CN: 你参加本地的手工市集，你做的手作发夹全部卖光，还被本地的非遗传承人看中，收你当徒弟，教你做传统缠花，你出的缠花教程视频卖了十几万份。

en_EN: The old pagoda tree downstairs blooms, so you pick some flowers to make pagoda flower tea. You shoot a video of the process, and many fans ask to buy it. You team up with your neighbors to make the tea, and use the proceeds to install fitness equipment in your community.
zh_CN: 你家楼下的老槐树开花了，你摘了一点做槐花茶，拍了视频，好多粉丝要买，你就联合小区的邻居一起做槐花茶，卖的钱用来给小区装了健身器材。

en_EN: There's a power outage in summer, so you're cooling off on the balcony. Your neighbor uncle brings you an iced watermelon, saying the iced watermelon recipe you shared in your video was delicious. You chat while eating, and find out he works with drones. Later, he shoots a lot of aerial footage of the town for you for free.
zh_CN: 夏天停电，你在阳台乘凉，隔壁的阿叔给你送了一个冰西瓜，说看你视频里教的冰西瓜的做法特别好吃，你们边吃西瓜边聊天，阿叔是做无人机的，后来免费帮你拍了好多小城的航拍素材。

en_EN: A stray cat you rescued earlier later becomes the "cat king" of the community. It brings different small gifts to your doorstep every day. You take photos of the gifts and post them online, and all your fans envy you for having a cat bodyguard.
zh_CN: 你之前救助的一只流浪猫，后来成了小区的猫王，每天都会带不同的小礼物放在你家门口，你把这些礼物拍下来发动态，粉丝都羡慕你有个猫保镖。

en_EN: You attend the local food festival, and the dessert you make wins first prize. You use the bonus to install an automatic watering system for your balcony plants.
zh_CN: 你去参加本地的美食节，你做的甜品得了一等奖，你用奖金给阳台装了个自动浇水系统。

en_EN: Your video of the town's winter snow is noticed by a film director, who hires you as the location scout consultant for his film set in the town. The pay is enough for you to buy the latest video editing computer.
zh_CN: 你拍的小城雪景视频被一个电影导演看中，找你当电影的小城取景顾问，给的报酬够你换一个最新的剪辑电脑。

en_EN: You find an injured baby hedgehog on the road, nurse it back to health and release it. It comes back to visit you often, bringing a small nut every time. Your "Hedgehog Visitor" video is reposted by the Animal Protection Association, who also invite you to be their charity publicity ambassador.
zh_CN: 你在路上捡到一只受伤的小刺猬，养好了伤放生，结果它经常回来看你，每次都带个小坚果，你拍的「刺猬访客」视频，被动物保护协会转发，还请你当他们的公益宣传大使。

en_EN: On the first snowy day of winter, you're shooting snow scenes from your balcony, and capture a small squirrel standing on your balcony railing munching on a pinecone. That video gets over 1 million views.
zh_CN: 冬天第一场雪，你在阳台拍雪景，刚好拍到一只小松鼠站在你家阳台栏杆上啃松果，那条视频播放量破了百万。

en_EN: A handwritten letter from a fan has a pack of lavender seeds inside. You sow them in your balcony pots, and they bloom into a patch of purple flowers in summer. The sachet merch you make with the flowers sells 3000 copies on the first day of launch.
zh_CN: 粉丝寄来的手写信里夹了一包薰衣草种子，你撒在阳台花盆里，夏天开出一片紫花，你用花做的香包周边上线当天卖了3000份。

en_EN: You go to the bookstore to buy books, and catch a publisher clearing out inventory. For only 20 yuan, you get the out-of-print *Local Flora Monograph of the Small Town*. You use the hand-drawn illustrations inside as cover materials for your videos.
zh_CN: 去书店买书，刚好碰到出版社清库存，你花20块钱淘到了绝版的《小城植物志》，里面的手绘插图你用来当视频封面素材。

en_EN: You join a local volunteer activity to teach handicrafts to left-behind children. The star-folding method you teach is recorded by the kids and posted as a short video, which goes viral unexpectedly. The charity organization invites you to be their publicity ambassador.
zh_CN: 去参加本地的志愿者活动，给留守儿童上手工课，你教的折星星方法被孩子们录下来发了短视频，意外火了之后，公益组织请你当他们的宣传大使。

en_EN: Your balcony clothesline breaks, and the new one hasn't arrived yet. Your elderly neighbor brings you a straw rope she wove herself. You shoot a video titled "The Warmth of Traditional Crafts", which helps the grandmother's straw woven products gain a national market.
zh_CN: 你家阳台的晾衣绳断了，新买的还没到，邻居阿婆给你送了一根她编的草绳，你拍了一期「老手艺的温度」视频，帮阿婆的草编产品打开了全国销路。

en_EN: You buy the wrong flower seeds, and after sowing them, a patch of rapeseed flowers grows. You set up a small scene on your balcony to shoot spring photos, and many fans from other cities come specially to you to take photos in the same style.
zh_CN: 买错了花种，撒下去长出了一片油菜花，你在阳台搭了个小景拍春日写真，好多外地的粉丝专门过来找你拍同款。

en_EN: You go to the river to shoot the sunset, and run into a couple taking wedding photos. The newlyweds ask you to take a few behind-the-scenes shots for them. The photos turn out really well, and they give you a red envelope as a thank you.
zh_CN: 去江边拍日落，刚好碰到有人拍婚纱照，新人请你帮他们拍几张花絮，照片效果非常好收到红包答谢。

en_EN: Your keyboard breaks while you're editing a video, so you rush to the computer mall to buy a new one. The shop owner is your fan, gives you 50% off, and also gives you a set of custom keycaps printed with your account's logo.
zh_CN: 你剪视频的时候键盘坏了，临时去电脑城买，老板是你的粉丝，给你打了五折，还送了你一套定制的键帽，上面印着你账号的logo。

en_EN: You go to a class reunion, and find out your old deskmate is a big data analyst. She makes a set of fan analysis tools for you for free. After you adjust your content using the tools, your fan engagement triples.
zh_CN: 你去参加同学聚会，发现以前的同桌是大数据分析师，她免费给你做了一套粉丝分析工具，你用工具调整内容后，粉丝粘性翻了三倍。

en_EN: An old food coupon (a historical currency used in China for rationing) is tucked inside the secondhand book you bought. It turns out to be a limited-edition commemorative issue.
zh_CN: 你买的二手书里夹着一张旧的粮票，意外是限量发行的纪念款。

en_EN: When you're shooting content about traditional crafts, a bamboo weaving artisan gives you a small hand-woven bamboo basket. You use it to hold small potted plants on your balcony, and all your fans want one. You collaborate with the artisan to release a co-branded bamboo basket, and donate all the proceeds to left-behind children.
zh_CN: 你去拍老手艺的时候，竹编艺人送了你一个手工编的小竹篮，你用来装阳台的小盆栽，粉丝都想要，你和艺人合作出了联名款竹篮，卖的钱全部捐给了留守儿童。

en_EN: When there's a power outage at your home, you light candles and shoot a video titled "Power Outage Night". A lighting brand notices it, hires you as their new product experience officer, and installs a full set of smart lighting systems on your balcony for free.
zh_CN: 你家停电的时候，你点了蜡烛拍了一期「停电的夜晚」视频，刚好被灯具品牌看中，找你做他们的新品体验官，免费给你家阳台装了一套智能灯光系统。

en_EN: You're editing videos until midnight and get hungry, so you dig out the homemade luosifen (snail rice noodle, a popular Chinese street food) a fan sent you. When you cook it, you find an extra packet of fried pork trotter inside, with a note from the fan saying she knows you love it. Your unboxing video makes the fan's small handmade luosifen shop go viral, and she sends you your favorite flavors every month after that.
zh_CN: 你剪视频到半夜饿了，翻出之前粉丝寄的自制螺蛳粉，煮的时候发现里面多放了一包单独的炸猪脚，粉丝留的小纸条说知道你爱吃，你拍的开箱视频带火了粉丝的手工螺蛳粉小铺，她后来每月都给你寄爱吃的口味。

en_EN: You forgot to check the result of the small town photography contest you entered earlier, when you suddenly got a call from the organizing committee telling you that you won the gold award. The prize money is just enough to install full-view glass windows on your balcony, so you can shoot more rainy scene footage.
zh_CN: 你之前投稿的小城摄影作品忘了查结果，突然收到组委会的电话说你拿了金奖，奖金刚好够你给阳台装个全景玻璃窗，能拍更多雨景素材。

en_EN: You spent a few dozen yuan on a hand-painted flower pot at a second-hand stall, and found a ticket to the first Peony Exhibition tucked inside. You followed the address on the ticket and found the peony garden is still there. After your video *The Peony Exhibition 40 Years Ago* went viral, the peony garden became a new popular check-in spot.
zh_CN: 你逛旧物摊花几十块买了个手绘花盆，里面夹着首届牡丹展的参观券，你按地址找过去，发现那片牡丹园还在，你拍的「40年前的牡丹展」视频火了之后，牡丹园成了新的打卡点。

en_EN: A turtledove flew into a flower pot on your balcony to build a nest and hatch eggs. You filmed its daily life every day and released a 9-episode series called *Turtledove Tenant*. Fans checked in every day to see if the baby turtledove had hatched, and the local animal protection association even sent you a special bird protection cover.
zh_CN: 你家阳台的花盆里飞来一只斑鸠搭窝孵蛋，你每天拍它的日常，出了9期「斑鸠房客」的连载，粉丝每天都蹲点看小斑鸠有没有破壳，当地的动物保护协会还给你送了专门的护鸟罩。

en_EN: The owner of the grocery store downstairs always says you have a nice voice, so she asked you to record the *Today's Specials* voice announcement for her store. In return, you can pick any one item for free from her store every month.
zh_CN: 楼下小卖部老板娘总说你声音好听，请你帮她录店铺的「今日特价」语音告示，作为回报，你每个月可以去她店里任意挑一样东西免单。

en_EN: You got a "Buy One Get One Free" cap when you bought a drink. With this cap, you won twelve consecutive bottles of the same soda, and finally the redemption point directly gave you a whole case.
zh_CN: 买饮料拿到1个「再来一瓶」的瓶盖，凭这个瓶盖你连续中了十二瓶同一款汽水，最后兑奖处直接给了你一箱。

en_EN: When you were cleaning the windows, you found a fully intact golden ginkgo leaf from five years ago trapped between the layers of the double-glazed glass. You took a photo to commemorate it and wrote: *A Gift from Frozen Time*.
zh_CN: 你擦窗户时发现双层玻璃夹层里困着一片五年前的银杏叶，完整金黄，你拍照留念并写道：「时间暂停的礼物」。

en_EN: You tried to paint small petals on the balcony wall with acrylic, but they came out crooked. After a light rain, the pigment ran down with the water and formed a natural gradient, which looked even better than your carefully planned painting. You kept this *Collaboration with the Rain*.
zh_CN: 你尝试用丙烯在阳台墙面画小花瓣，画得歪歪扭扭，一场小雨后，颜料顺着水流形成天然晕染，效果比精心画的还好，你保留了这个「雨的合作」。

en_EN: You were competing with a friend on the basketball machine at the arcade. You were never good at it, but you took a random shot at the last second. The ball bounced three times on the rim and went in, allowing you to win by one point and take all the dolls he had just caught.
zh_CN: 和朋友在游戏厅比赛投篮球机，你原本最不擅长，最后一秒胡乱一抛，球在框上弹了三下居然进了，以一分优势反杀，赢走了他刚抓到的所有娃娃。

en_EN: The supermarket was holding an anniversary raffle for customers who spent over 88 yuan. You took a random draw, and among a basket of consolation prize laundry detergents, you won the grand prize - a small electric scooter, which perfectly solves your transportation problem when going out to shoot footage.
zh_CN: 超市周年庆消费满88元可抽奖，你随手一抽，在一筐安慰奖洗衣液中抽中了特等奖——一辆小电动车，正好解决你外出拍素材的交通问题。

en_EN: You sent a casual complaining bullet comment while watching a brand live stream, and you were selected as the "Lucky Viewer" by the system. The prize is a full set of professional audio recording equipment that you have been eyeing for a long time but were reluctant to buy.
zh_CN: 看品牌直播时随手发了一句吐槽弹幕，结果被系统抽中为“幸运观众”，奖品是你觊觎已久但舍不得买的全套专业收音设备。

en_EN: Your neighbor dragged you to make up the numbers for a mahjong game. You had no idea about the rules and just played randomly the whole time, but you kept getting small wins. By the end of the game, you ended up winning the most money, and everyone joked that you were the "God of War in New Player Protection Period".
zh_CN: 被邻居拉去凑角打麻将，完全不懂规则的你全程“乱打”，结果频频“屁胡”，结束时竟成了赢钱最多的人，大家笑称你是“新手保护期战神”。

en_EN: You went to the back mountain to collect moss early in the morning, and accidentally stepped on a loose stone slab, revealing a handful of century-old wild flower seeds perfectly preserved under the soil. After planting them, they bloomed into light pink lily of the valley.
zh_CN: 清晨去后山采苔藓，无意间踩开一块松动的石板，底下藏着一捧被泥土保护得完好的百年野生花种，种下后开出了浅粉铃兰。

en_EN: While sorting out old items in the villa attic, you found a dusty brass flower vessel. After wiping it clean, you found the signature of the first generation florist engraved on the bottom. It turned out to be a one-of-a-kind piece made with the "forged gold" craft that has been lost in the town for a long time.
zh_CN: 整理别墅阁楼的旧物时，翻到一个落满灰尘的黄铜花器，擦拭干净发现底部刻着初代花艺师的签名，竟是小镇失传已久的 “锻金” 工艺打造的孤品。

en_EN: You bought handmade honey at the market in the town center, and the stall owner smilingly gave you a small jar of homemade nectar jam. After tasting it, you found it was brewed with wild honeysuckle unique to the back mountain, which can perfectly neutralize the slightly astringent aroma of your newly cultivated blue roses.
zh_CN: 在镇中心的市集买手工蜂蜜，摊主笑着塞给你一小罐自制的花蜜酱，尝过后发现是用后山独有的野生忍冬花酿的，恰好能调和你新培育的蓝玫瑰的微涩香气。

en_EN: When you were closing the windows of the greenhouse on a rainy night, you found a soaked stray kitten curled up under the windowsill. The day after you took it in, the cat led you to a hidden spring. Water from this spring can extend the flowering period of flowers by half a month when used for irrigation.
zh_CN: 雨夜给花房关窗时，发现窗沿下蜷缩着一只淋湿的小野猫，收留它的第二天，猫咪竟引着你找到了一处隐秘的泉眼，用来浇灌花卉能让花期延长半月。

en_EN: When repotting your newly cultivated rose seedlings, you casually dug up the top layer of humus soil, and found several natural ambers mixed in the soil, which are perfect to be used as exclusive accessories for your floral works.
zh_CN: 给新培育的玫瑰幼苗换盆时，随手扒开表层腐殖土，竟发现土里混着几颗天然琥珀，恰好能做你花艺作品的专属配饰。

en_EN: When you ventilated the greenhouse early in the morning, you found that last night's dew had condensed into natural flower-shaped patterns on the glass. The photo you casually took became the core design inspiration for your new series of floral works.
zh_CN: 清晨给花房通风，发现昨夜的露水在玻璃上凝结成了天然花型纹路，你随手拍下的画面，成了新系列花艺作品的核心设计灵感。

en_EN: When making hot tea in winter, you casually grabbed a handful of local dried flowers from the jar to add flavor. Halfway through drinking, you found a few strands of very rare dried edelweiss petals mixed in, which you accidentally brought back stuck to your clothes when you went into the mountain late last autumn. The brewed tea has a clear, fresh mountain aroma.
zh_CN: 冬日煮热茶时，随手从罐子里抓了把本地的干花调味，喝到一半才发现，其中混着几缕极罕见的雪绒花干瓣，是去年深秋进山时无意间粘在衣角带回的，泡出的茶带着清冽的山野香气。

en_EN: While helping Luke organize the organic fertilizer warehouse, you found a clump of forgotten wild ferns under a pile of leaf mold. The veins of the leaves perfectly match the outline of your newly conceived "Time Corridor" floral work, becoming the most eye-catching element of the piece.
zh_CN: 帮卢克整理有机肥料仓库时，在一堆腐叶土下发现一丛被遗忘的野生蕨类，叶片的纹路恰好契合你新构思的 “时光回廊” 花艺作品的轮廓，成了作品里最点睛的元素。

en_EN: When patrolling the flowers on the back mountain, your skirt was accidentally caught by a clump of wild roses. You pushed aside the branches and leaves and found a leeward natural cave, which has constant temperature and humidity all year round, perfectly suitable for the rare tropical orchids you have always wanted to cultivate.
zh_CN: 在后山巡护花卉时，无意间被一丛野蔷薇勾住裙摆，拨开枝叶发现一处背风的天然岩洞，里面常年恒温恒湿，完美适配你一直想培育的热带珍稀兰花。

en_EN: You went to the town's grocery store to buy gardening tools, and the owner casually gave you a box of imported flower seeds that had been sitting in stock for years. After planting them, they bloomed into retro double peonies that have long been extinct on the market, and the color is exactly the shade of pink you were missing for your competition entry.
zh_CN: 去镇里的杂货铺买园艺工具，老板随手送了你一盒积压多年的进口花籽，种下后竟开出了市面上早已绝迹的复古重瓣芍药，花色恰好是你参赛作品缺的一抹粉色。

en_EN: After the heavy rain, you went to the back mountain to check on the flowers, and accidentally found a smooth rhyolite washed by the water by the stream. The natural patterns on the stone surface are perfect to be used as the base for your floral installation.
zh_CN: 暴雨过后去后山查看花卉，无意间在溪流边捡到一块被水冲得光滑的流纹岩，石面的天然纹路恰好能做你花艺装置的底座。

en_EN: When adding firewood to the villa's fireplace, you found a section of natural burl in the firewood you picked up. You polished it and made it into a pen holder, which has a flowing golden luster on the surface.
zh_CN: 给别墅壁炉添柴时，随手拿起的木柴里夹着一截天然树瘤，打磨后做成了笔筒，表面流淌着金色的光泽。

en_EN: When sweeping fallen leaves in autumn, you casually picked up a few intact oak leaves and tucked them in your notebook. You unexpectedly found that the veins of the leaves can be perfectly transferred onto washi paper, becoming the exclusive invitation pattern for your floral salon.
zh_CN: 秋日扫落叶时，随手捡了几片形状完整的橡树叶夹在笔记本里，竟意外发现叶片的脉络能完美拓印在和纸之上，成了你花艺沙龙专属的邀请函纹样

en_EN: You were guarding the newly cut seedlings in the greenhouse on a rainy night, and accidentally found a group of fireflies outside the window, resting on the leaves of the seedlings. The faint light just helped you see the newly grown roots of the seedlings clearly, and this group of fireflies has settled in your greenhouse ever since.
zh_CN: 雨夜在花房守着刚扦插的幼苗，无意间发现窗外来了一群萤火虫，停在幼苗的叶片上，微弱的光恰好帮你看清了幼苗新生的根系，而这群萤火虫此后便定居在了你的花房里。

en_EN: You went to the old tailor shop in town to customize aprons for the floral salon, and the tailor casually gave you a roll of retro lace that had been in stock for a long time. It is perfect for decorating your floral vessels and matches the style of the Victorian villa perfectly.
zh_CN: 去镇里的老裁缝铺定做花艺沙龙的围裙，裁缝师傅随手送了你一卷积压的复古蕾丝，恰好能用来装饰你的花艺花器，和维多利亚别墅的风格完美适配。

en_EN: You went for a walk on the back mountain after snow in winter, and accidentally found a clump of sprouting wild snowdrops under the snow. After transplanting them to the greenhouse, they bloomed on New Year's Eve, becoming the core protagonist of your New Year floral work.
zh_CN: 冬日雪后去后山散步，无意间在雪层下发现了一丛冒芽的野生雪滴花，移栽到花房后，竟在除夕当天开出了花，成了你新年花艺作品的核心主角。

en_EN: After the heavy rain, a few wild clematis unexpectedly grew on the wall outside your greenhouse. The color is the deep purple retro shade you have been looking for for a long time. After cutting propagation, they became a natural flower wall for your greenhouse.
zh_CN: 暴雨过后，你花房外的围墙上，竟意外长出了几株野生铁线莲，花色是你找了很久的深紫复古色，扦插后成了你花房的天然花墙。

en_EN: A cup of rainwater you left on the windowsill unexpectedly grew a clump of rare green algae. The natural pigment extracted from it can dye your preserved flowers a unique forest-style green, which does not fade and also has a faint herbal fragrance.
zh_CN: 你随手放在窗台的一杯雨水，竟意外长出了一团罕见的绿水藻，提取后制成的天然色素，能给你的永生花染上独一无二的森系绿色，不褪色还带着淡淡的草木香。

en_EN: You went to the back mountain to collect moss, and accidentally found a natural moss lawn with uniform thickness and delicate texture, which is perfect to be used as the base for your large floral installation, saving you months of cultivation time.
zh_CN: 去后山采集苔藓，无意间发现了一片天然的苔藓草坪，厚度均匀、质感细腻，恰好能用来做你大型花艺装置的基底，省去了数月的培育时间。

en_EN: The owner of the town's bakery casually gave you a bag of wheat bran left over from baking bread. You fermented it at home and made it into flower fertilizer, which made your rare amaryllis that had been stunted for a long time suddenly grow three flower stalks.
zh_CN: 小镇的面包店老板随手给了你一袋烤面包剩下的麦麸，回家发酵后做成的花肥，竟让你一直僵苗的稀有朱顶红，一下子抽出了三根花箭。

en_EN: The photo of the sunrise over the greenhouse you casually took was selected by the town tourism bureau and printed as official promotional postcards.
zh_CN: 你随手拍下的花房日出照片，被小镇旅游局选中印成了官方宣传明信片。

en_EN: The wild flower mix you casually sowed on the open space of the back mountain unexpectedly attracted a large number of pollinating insects, which nearly doubled the fruit setting rate of the rare flowers on the back mountain, greatly accelerating your conservation progress.
zh_CN: 你随手播撒在后山空地上的野花组合，竟意外吸引了大量传粉昆虫，让后山的珍稀花卉坐果率提升了近一倍，大大加快了你的保育进度。

en_EN: A cup of honey water you left in the greenhouse unexpectedly attracted a group of wild bees. They built a nest under the eaves of your greenhouse, producing honey with a strong rose aroma, and also helping to naturally pollinate your flowers.
zh_CN: 你随手放在花房里的一杯蜂蜜水，竟意外吸引了一群野生蜜蜂，它们在你花房的屋檐下筑了巢，产出的蜂蜜带着浓郁的玫瑰香气，还帮你的花卉完成了天然授粉。

en_EN: The small ornament you casually made with dead branches and dried flowers was seen by a famous director who was traveling in the town, and he took the initiative to invite you to be the floral art director for his new film.
zh_CN: 你随手用枯枝和干花做的小摆件，被来小镇旅游的知名导演看到，主动邀请你为他的新电影做花艺美术指导。

en_EN: When wrapping thermal insulation cotton around the greenhouse plants in winter, you casually opened a roll of old wool felt, and found a complete century-old wool tapestry tucked inside, embroidered with Victorian garden patterns. It became the highlight decoration of your villa's living room.
zh_CN: 冬日给花房的植物裹保温棉，随手拆开一卷旧羊毛毡，发现里面夹着一张完整的百年前羊毛挂毯，上面绣着维多利亚时期的花园纹样，成了你别墅客厅的点睛装饰。

en_EN: The floral creation diary you casually recorded was seen by a publisher's editor, who took the initiative to contact you to publish your personal portfolio.
zh_CN: 你随手记录的花艺创作日记，被出版社的编辑看到，主动联系你出版个人作品集。

en_EN: After the heavy rain, a small section of the villa's fence was washed away. While cleaning up the debris, you found a whole box of intact Victorian-era glass vases buried underground, which are perfect as exclusive vessels for your works at the international art exhibition.
zh_CN: 暴雨过后，别墅的围墙被冲垮了一小块，清理时竟发现了地下埋着的一整箱维多利亚时期的玻璃花器，每一个都完好无损，恰好能用来做你国际艺术展作品的专属花器。

en_EN: You casually installed a bird feeder in the corner of the greenhouse, which unexpectedly attracted a group of local tits to settle down. They ate most of the pests in the greenhouse, so you no longer need to spray pesticides on your flowers.
zh_CN: 你随手在花房的角落装了一个喂鸟器，竟吸引了一群本地的山雀定居，它们帮你吃掉了花房里绝大多数的害虫，让你的花卉再也不用喷洒杀虫剂。

en_EN: The flower fertilizer you casually made from coffee grounds unexpectedly doubled the intensity of the blue hue of the blue roses you cultivated, and the flowers also carry a faint coffee aroma. This exclusive formula has become a signature feature of your works.
zh_CN: 你随手用咖啡渣做的花肥，竟让你培育的蓝玫瑰蓝晕色泽比之前浓郁了一倍，还带着淡淡的咖啡香气，这个独家配方成了你作品的标志性特色。

en_EN: After graduation, you returned to the small town and rented a one-bedroom apartment with a balcony, devoting yourself to running a life aesthetics self-media account. Although your follower count grows slowly, your exquisite content has a very good reputation in a small circle.
zh_CN: 你毕业后回到小城，租下一间带阳台的一居室，安心做生活美学类自媒体。虽粉丝增长缓慢，但内容精致，在小圈子里口碑很好。

en_EN: One of your popular posts about "slow life in small towns" was fully plagiarized by a major account under a local MCN agency with millions of followers. The other party's traffic soared, while your rights protection comments were deleted and you were blocked.
zh_CN: 你一篇关于“小城慢生活”的爆款图文，被本地一个坐拥百万粉丝的MCN机构旗下大号全文抄袭，对方流量暴涨，而你的维权留言被删除拉黑

en_EN: You feel angry and helpless. The other party is a local giant, and you are afraid that public rights protection will bring more cyberbullying or even real-life trouble, so you once thought about swallowing the insult.
zh_CN: 你感到愤怒又无助，对方是本地巨头，你怕公开维权会招来更大的网络暴力甚至现实麻烦，想过忍气吞声

en_EN: Your loyal fan, a retired veteran media reporter, sent you a private message. He had sorted out a complete chain of evidence of plagiarism, and told you: "Truth becomes clearer only through debate, little girl. Let me teach you how to use the weapon of public opinion."
zh_CN: 你的忠实粉丝、一位退休的媒体老记者私信你，他梳理了完整的抄袭证据链，并告诉你：“真理不辩不明，小姑娘，我教你如何用舆论的武器。”

en_EN: You accepted the old reporter's guidance, recorded your first rights protection video on the balcony, clearly listed all evidence, and officially declared war on the plagiarist. After the video was released, you officially stepped into a special world full of online disputes.
zh_CN: 你接受了老记者的指导，在阳台上录制了第一条维权视频，明确列出证据，正式向抄袭者宣战。视频发出，你正式踏入充满网络硝烟的特殊世界

en_EN: Your rights protection video caused a small stir at first, but was soon flooded by comments from the other party's paid trolls, who accused you of "faking disputes to gain attention" and "being desperate for fame". You went through a series of setbacks including cyberbullying, losing followers, and insomnia, but you also met several other bloggers who had been infringed by the same agency, and you formed an alliance.
zh_CN: 你的维权视频激起小范围水花，但很快被对方的水军评论淹没，对方反咬你“碰瓷”、“想红想疯了”。你经历了被网暴、掉粉、失眠等一系列小挫折，但也结识了几位同样被该机构侵权过的博主，结成盟友

en_EN: The other party released a long article to turn the tables, framing you for "plagiarizing others in your early works" and implying that you had a messy private life, trying to destroy your reputation completely. Voices supporting you were drowned out, and you fell into a full-blown trust crisis.
zh_CN: 对方发布长文，倒打一耙，诬陷你早期的作品也有“借鉴”嫌疑，并暗示你私生活混乱，试图从人格上摧毁你。支持你的声音被淹没，你陷入全面的信任危机

en_EN: You received a private warning call from the MCN boss, who spoke arrogantly and told you to "be smart and delete the video, then you can still get some small benefits". Looking at the wilted plants on your balcony, you felt unprecedented despair, and for the first time doubted whether the meaning of your insistence on originality was just a joke.
zh_CN: 你收到MCN老板的私下警告电话，语气傲慢，让你“识相点删视频，还能给你点汤喝”。你看着阳台上枯萎的植物，感到前所未有的绝望，第一次怀疑自己坚持原创的意义是否只是个笑话

en_EN: Late at night, you flipped through old photos of you and your mother, and remembered that your original intention of running the self-media account was to record real beauty. Your anger subsided and you calmed down. You suddenly realized that all the other party's attacks were based on lies, while you had full records of the real creation process (drafts, shooting behind-the-scenes, timestamps). You awakened a new ability: to turn complex evidence into highly empathetic narratives. You were no longer a weak victim, but a warrior holding the truth.
zh_CN: 深夜，你翻看自己和母亲的老照片，想起当初做自媒体的初心是为了记录真实的美好。怒火沉淀为冷静。你突然意识到，对方所有的攻击都建立在“谎言”上，而你有全部真实的创作过程记录（草稿、拍摄花絮、时间戳）。你觉醒了一种能力：将复杂证据转化为极具共情力的叙事。你不再是软弱的受害者，而是手握真相的战

en_EN: You did not fight back immediately. Following the old reporter's strategy, you quietly turned your creation process into a series of short videos, while secretly collecting evidence of the other party's trolls controlling comments and threatening other bloggers. You returned to your identity as a "content creator", but this time, content was your weapon.
zh_CN: 你没有立即反击。而是按照老记者的策略，默默把创作历程做成一个系列短片，同时悄悄收集对方水军控评、威胁其他博主的证据。你回归到“内容创作者”的身份，但这次，内容是你的武器

en_EN: You chose the time when the MCN agency's annual press conference was broadcast live across all platforms to release all your original proof, solid evidence of the other party's plagiarism, and the complete chain of evidence of their malicious framing and suppression of other bloggers at once. It instantly broke through the other party's public opinion control, the press conference collapsed on the spot, and public opinion across the internet was completely reversed. Bloggers infringed by the agency collectively spoke out to confirm your claims, and all the slurs thrown at you were completely debunked.
zh_CN: 你选在MCN机构年度发布会全平台直播的节点，一次性放出全部原创存证、对方抄袭实锤及恶意构陷、打压其他博主的完整证据链，瞬间击穿对方舆论控场，发布会当场翻车，全网舆论彻底反转，被该机构侵权的博主集体发声佐证，对方泼向你的所有污名全部不攻自破。

en_EN: The plagiarizing account was banned, and the MCN agency's reputation was completely ruined. You not only won an apology and compensation, but also saw a surge in your follower count, and became a symbolic figure for the rights of original creators. You returned to your small home with the balcony, the sun was still shining as before, but you knew that you now had the power to protect the things you love.
zh_CN: 抄袭号被封，MCN机构声誉扫地。你不仅赢得了道歉和赔偿，粉丝数暴涨，更成为了原创者权益的象征人物。你回到阳台的小家，阳光依旧，但你知道，你已拥有保护自己热爱之事的力量

en_EN: You stay in the greenhouse of your Victorian-style villa, accompanying flowers and plants day after day, enjoying the peace. You have superb skills, but only create for yourself and a few close friends, avoiding all public activities. The villa is your safest fortress.
zh_CN: 你在维多利亚风格别墅的花房里，日复一日与花草为伴，享受宁静。你技艺精湛，但只为自己和少数知己创作，逃避一切公开活动。别墅是你最安全的堡垒。

en_EN: The mayor personally visited you, pleading with you to represent the town in the "Spring Floral Master Competition" to boost the town's tourism industry. Richard, the arrogant former champion, spread words in the town that "the hermit is just a has-been who has run out of talent".
zh_CN: 镇长亲自登门，恳请你代表本镇参加“春日花艺大师赛”，以振兴小镇旅游业。往届冠军、傲慢的理查德在镇上放话，称“隐居者无非是江郎才尽。

en_EN: You remembered the past when your ideas were plagiarized and you were ostracized in the city, and you were afraid of being exposed to public scrutiny again. You refused the mayor on the grounds that you "do not like competition".
zh_CN: 你想起曾在都市被剽窃创意并遭排挤的往事，恐惧再次暴露在公众审视下。你以“不喜竞争”为由，拒绝了镇长。

en_EN: Your elderly neighbor, Mrs. Irene, a former top botanist, knocked on your door. She did not persuade you, but just took you to see a dying rare blue iris in her greenhouse, saying: "If it is afraid to bloom, it will really die. Beauty sometimes needs a little brave 'selfishness'." Her words quietly woke you up.
zh_CN: 你年迈的邻居、曾是顶尖植物学家的艾琳夫人敲开你的门。她没有劝你，只是带你去看她温室里一株濒死的稀有蓝色鸢尾，说：“它害怕绽放，就会真的死去。美，有时候需要一点勇敢的‘自私’。”她的话悄然点醒了你。

en_EN: You looked at the rose seedling with a unique blue hue that you had accidentally cultivated in your greenhouse, and made a decision. You signed up with the mayor, and publicly responded to Richard: "The owner of the garden should decide when to open the garden wall."
zh_CN: 你看着自己花房中一株偶然培育出的、拥有独特蓝晕的玫瑰幼苗，做出了决定。你向镇长报名，并公开回应理查德：“花园的墙，该由主人自己决定何时打开。”

en_EN: You started creating for the competition. You designed your entry scheme using the structure of the villa's old glass greenhouse. Richard sent spies to snoop around and spread rumors that you "use chemicals to produce deformed flowers". You met Luke, a young farmer who provided you with special organic fertilizer, and became allies.
zh_CN: 你开始为比赛创作。你利用别墅的老旧玻璃花房结构设计参赛方案。理查德派眼线来打探，散播你“用药剂催生畸形花”的谣言。你结识了为你提供特殊有机肥料的年轻农夫盟友卢克。

en_EN: A week before the competition, your core material, the blue-hued rose, suddenly got infected with a rare disease. All conventional treatments were ineffective, and Richard was waiting to see you make a fool of yourself. Despair hung over the greenhouse.
zh_CN: 比赛前一周，你的核心材料——那株蓝晕玫瑰，突然感染了罕见病害。所有常规方法无效，而理查德正等着看你的笑话。绝望笼罩了花房。

en_EN: The rose's condition worsened, and you almost gave up. On a rainy night, you were alone in the greenhouse, as if you were back to the time when you licked your wounds alone after being betrayed. You questioned whether you really had the ability to face all this.
zh_CN: 玫瑰病情恶化，你几乎要放弃。雨夜，你独自在花房，仿佛回到过去被背叛后独自舔舐伤口的时刻。你质问自己是否真的有能力面对这一切。

en_EN: You remembered Mrs. Irene's words about the will of plants to survive, and the antibacterial properties of a local wild moss that Luke had mentioned. You went out in the rain to collect the moss, and boldly tried to make a mixed dressing. After staying up all night waiting, the rose's condition stabilized, and its blue hue miraculously deepened. You gained not only a solution to save the rose, but also the belief to "follow nature and your inner intuition".
zh_CN: 你想起了艾琳夫人关于植物求生意志的话，以及卢克曾提过的本地一种野生苔藓的抗菌特性。你冒雨采集，大胆尝试制成混合敷料。一夜守候后，玫瑰病情稳定，并奇迹般地加深了蓝晕色彩。你获得的不仅是拯救方案，更是“遵从自然与内心直觉”的信念。

en_EN: On the day of the competition, you entered with the recovered blue-hued rose and your work themed "Time Corridor". Richard sneered at it, and the jury chairman also expressed doubts about your non-traditional structure.
zh_CN: 比赛日，你带着康复的蓝晕玫瑰和以“时光回廊”为主题的作品登场。理查德嗤之以鼻，评委会主席也对你的非传统结构表示疑虑。

en_EN: During the judging session, you calmly explained: "My work is not in the vase, but in the dialogue between light and glass. This shade of blue is the color after loneliness reconciles with time." Just then, the sun penetrated the glass roof of the greenhouse, casting shifting light and shadow on the landscape you built with dead branches, fresh moss and blue roses, shocking the entire audience. Richard's lavishly piled work suddenly looked pale in comparison. You not only won the competition, but also completely bid farewell to the fear of the past.
zh_CN: 评审环节，你平静地阐述：“我的作品不在瓶中，而在光与玻璃的对话里。这抹蓝，是孤独与时间和解后的颜色。”阳光恰好穿透玻璃花房顶，在你以枯枝、鲜苔与蓝玫瑰构筑的景观上投下变幻光影，震撼全场。理查德的奢华堆砌之作顿时显得苍白。你不仅赢得了比赛，更完成了对过去恐惧的彻底告别。

en_EN: You brought back the champion trophy and placed it on the fireplace in the villa's living room. The town welcomed more tourists because of your fame, but you did not change your nature of living in seclusion. You started to occasionally hold small salons in the greenhouse, only inviting people who know how to appreciate your work. You protected your peace, but also gained the right to choose when to open up.
zh_CN: 你捧回冠军奖杯，将它放在别墅客厅的壁炉上。小镇因你的名气迎来了游客，但你并未改变隐居的本质。你开始偶尔在花房举办小型沙龙，只邀请懂得欣赏的人。你保护了自己的宁静，但也拥有了选择开放的权力。

en_EN: In the afternoon, the cat on the windowsill licks its paws slowly.
zh_CN: 午后，窗台上的猫慢条斯理地舔着爪子。

en_EN: Every time it licks its paw, a small tuft of dried dandelion, the aroma of freshly baked bread, or a wisp of setting sun passing through the curtains is carefully and evenly spread by it on the softest part of its heart.
zh_CN: 它每舔一下，就有一小团晒干的蒲公英、刚烤好的面包香气，或是一缕穿过窗帘的斜阳，被它细细地、均匀地铺在心底最柔软的地方。

en_EN: When night falls, it curls up, rests its head on the warmth collected during the day, and weaves a fluffy, purring dream.
zh_CN: 等夜幕降临，它盘起身子，头枕着这些白天收集的暖意，便织成了一个毛茸茸的、会咕噜咕噜响的梦。

en_EN: The little girl squatted beside the rattan chair, staring at the orange cat that always tucked its paws tightly in its arms, not even exposing them when sleeping. She tugged at the corner of her grandma's clothes: "Why does the cat always hide its paws?"
zh_CN:
小女孩蹲在藤椅边，盯着橘猫总把爪子严严实实揣在怀里，连睡觉都不肯露出来。
她扯了扯奶奶的衣角：“猫猫为什么总把爪子藏起来呀？”

en_EN: Grandma smiled and whispered: "It is holding a belly full of soft words." "Do soft words need to be hidden too?"
zh_CN:
奶奶笑着轻声说：“它在揣着一肚子的软话呢。”
“软话也要藏起来吗？”

en_EN: "Mhm, it is afraid that if it exposes them casually, the wind will blow the tenderness away. Only when it meets someone who treats it sincerely will it stretch out its paws, and gently hand all the unspoken affection it has saved for a long time to you."
zh_CN: “嗯，它怕随便露出来，风会把温柔吹走。只有遇到真心待它的人，它才会把爪子伸开，把攒了好久的、没说出口的喜欢，全都轻轻递到你手里呀。”

en_EN: By the west mountain at dusk, there is always a chubby cloud that never drifts to the horizon with the wind. It only brushes slowly against the mountaintop, floating back and forth, and won't sink slowly until the sky is completely dark.
zh_CN: 傍晚的西山边，总有一朵胖乎乎的云，不跟着风往天边走，只慢悠悠地蹭着山顶，来来回回地飘，直到天完全黑透，才肯慢慢沉下去。

en_EN: It is not lost. It is tucking the little pine tree on the mountaintop in a quilt. The mountain night is too cold for the newly sprouted pine sapling to withstand the cold wind, so the cloud stretches itself into soft cotton wadding, brushing against the pine needles again and again to wrap it in a thin layer of warmth.
zh_CN: 它不是迷了路，是在给山顶的小松树盖被子。山里的夜太凉，刚冒尖的小松树扛不住夜里的寒风，云朵就把自己拉成软软的棉絮，一遍遍地蹭着松针，给它裹上一层薄薄的暖。

en_EN: Only when it confirms that the little pine tree won't freeze does it melt into the night at ease, turning all its remaining tenderness into the clear frost that rests on the pine needles at dawn the next day.
zh_CN: 等确认小松树不会冻着了，它才会放心地融进夜色里，把剩下的温柔，都化作第二天清晨，落在松针上的清霜。

en_EN: When it is quiet, the kitten's ears twirl gently like radar. It is not on alert, but sorting out the fragments of emotions drifting in the air.
zh_CN:
安静时，小猫的耳朵像雷达般轻轻转动。
它不是在戒备，而是在整理空气里飘散的情绪碎片

en_EN: The teardrop about to fall from a child's eye, the quiet anxiety drifting from the kitchen, the sigh tucked between the pages of a book. Its ears are like two tiny whirlpools, sucking in all the overly sharp emotions, filtering and breaking them down in the soft fur deep in the auricle, turning them into dandelions that can be blown away easily.
zh_CN: 孩童未掉落的那滴眼泪、厨房里悄悄飘散的焦虑、书页间夹着的一声叹息。它的耳朵像两片小小的旋涡，把所有过于尖锐的情绪吸入，在耳廓深处柔软的绒毛里过滤、打散，变成可以吹散的蒲公英。

en_EN: Then the room is suddenly filled with a quietness that slows your breath -- that's it quietly reducing the noise for the whole space.
zh_CN: 于是房间里忽然有了让呼吸放缓的安静，那是它在为整个空间悄悄降噪。

en_EN: In autumn, the squirrel hurriedly buries an acorn in the pile of fallen leaves. It knows that deep in the soil, there is a sleeping "Winter".
zh_CN: 秋天，松鼠匆匆将一颗橡子埋进落叶堆。它知道泥土深处，有一位沉睡的“冬天”。

en_EN: This acorn marked with tooth marks is a small, crispy greeting gift. When the first snow falls, a very soft, satisfied snore will come from under the ground.
zh_CN: 这颗带着齿痕的橡子，是一份小小的、酥脆的见面礼。当第一场雪落下，地底会传来一声极轻的、满足的鼾声。

en_EN: In the coming spring, the new bud growing there will sing a song about snoring and gifts that only the squirrel can hear.
zh_CN: 来年春天，那里长出的新芽，会唱着只有松鼠能听见的、关于鼾声与馈赠的歌。

en_EN: The little boy noticed that the puppy at home always carries his worn cotton socks in its mouth, curls up in the corner of the sofa and holds them tightly, refusing to let go even when eating. He asked his grandma: "Why does the puppy always hold my old socks?"
zh_CN:
小男孩发现，家里的小狗总叼着他穿旧的棉袜子，窝在沙发角抱得紧紧的，连吃饭都不肯松口。
他问外婆：“小狗为什么总抱着我的旧袜子呀？”

en_EN: Grandma rubbed his head and said: "It's saving your scent." "What does it save the scent for?"
zh_CN:
外婆揉了揉他的头说：“它在攒你的味道呢。”
“攒味道做什么？”

en_EN: When you go to school or go out to play, it can't see you, so it holds the socks with your scent, just like you're still sitting beside it to keep it company. It saves all its longing for the whole day in the socks, and when you push open the door, it will wag its tail and welcome you with the joy it has saved up for so long.
zh_CN: “你上学、出去玩的时候，它见不到你，就抱着有你味道的袜子，就像你还坐在它身边陪它一样。它把一整天的想念都攒在里面，等你推开家门，就摇着尾巴，用攒了好久的欢喜来欢迎你。”

en_EN: The calico cat always steps on your keyboard when you're typing, often messing up the half-finished document. You've scolded it several times, but it just tilts its head and looks at you, not running away.
zh_CN: 三花总爱趁你敲键盘的时候踩上来，经常把你写了一半的文档踩得乱七八糟，你骂过它好几次，它就歪着脑袋看你，也不跑。

en_EN: Yesterday you were shedding tears in front of a blank document, and it stepped on the keyboard again. This time, the characters it typed happened to be the first pinyin letters of "Be Happy".
zh_CN: 昨天你对着空白文档掉眼泪，它又踩上来，这次踩出来的字居然是“要开心”的拼音首字母。

en_EN: Later the old granny in the alley told you that every kitten has a lot of whispers. They can't type, so they stand on tiptoe and tap the care hidden in their paw pads to you word by word. It doesn't matter if they tap the wrong keys. Even if the love is crooked, it can still land right in your heart.
zh_CN: 后来老巷的婆婆告诉你，每只小猫都有很多悄悄话，它们不会打字，就踮着脚把藏在肉垫里的关心一个字一个字敲给你，踩错了也没关系，爱意歪歪扭扭的，也照样能落进你心里。
